prestazioni: Engine: M276 DE 30 AL (3.0L V6 Biturbo) - Full Weistec W.3 Stage 3+ upgrade with custom billet crankshaft, forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam rods, and Weistec ported cylinder heads with oversized valves (38mm intake, 32mm exhaust) and upgraded valve springs. Includes Weistec’s hybrid turbocharger kit featuring Garrett GTX3582R turbos with billet compressor wheels, TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, and custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipes with 200-cell catalytic converters for emissions compliance.

Drivetrain: SPEEDCLUTCH Stage 3 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel (lightweight, 8.5kg) and Quaife ATB differential (85% lockup) for the 9G-Tronic transmission. Includes a custom TCU tune by Dimsport Genius to reduce shift times to 120ms with launch control set at 4,500 RPM and flat-shifting enabled up to 7,200 RPM (factory redline: 6,800 RPM).

Suspension/Handling: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, and high-speed compression) and remote reservoirs, paired with H&R Monoball front subframe bushings and polyurethane rear trailing arm bushings. Brembo GT 6-piston front calipers (380mm discs) and 4-piston rear calipers (350mm discs) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid. Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35/19 front, 285/30/19 rear) on OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (19x9.5 ET30 front, 19x11 ET45 rear).
estetica: Aero: Prior Design PD-MBC45 widebody kit with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3D-printed active rear wing (adjustable via electric actuators) with a 1,200mm span and Gurney flap. Includes a custom front bumper lip with integrated LED turn signals and a carbon fiber hood with functional heat extractors.

Exterior: Full Respray in Mercedes-Benz Designo Magno Selenite Grey (matte) with PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus) and ceramic coating (Gyeon Ceramic Quartz). OEM+ AMG Night Package with blacked-out trim, including carbon fiber mirror caps (by Vorsteiner), black AMG grille with vertical slats, and dechromed window trim. LED headlights upgraded to Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs with custom DRL delete.

Interior: Full carbon fiber weave interior by AutoTrim Design, including dashboard, door cards, center console, and rear trim. Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by Matter Fab (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Alpine iLX-F511 head unit with Kicker KXA840.5 amplifier and MB Quart QS-216 component speakers.
